title: PawnKit conformance result report
description: Generic result format an implementation repository (pawn-parser, pawn-analysis, pawn-project, pawn-api, pawnserver, sampctl, or a third party) can emit to report what it satisfies against pawnkit-spec's RFCs/schemas/profiles. See conformance/manifest.md.

version.description: Version or commit of the subject repository under test.

specVersion.description: pawnkit-spec tag/commit these checks were run against.

profile.description: RFC 0001 profile id this run exercised, if the checks are profile-specific.

id.description: Stable id for this specific conformance assertion, e.g. "pawn-project/dependency-string-format".

rfc.description: The rfcs/NNNN this check exercises, e.g. "0002".

schema.description: The schema $id this check validates against, if applicable.

fixture.description: Path or identifier of the input fixture exercised, for reproducibility.
